- [5] Announcer: Minion, wake up.

- [11] Announcer: Minion, close your eyes.
- [12] James: Banana.
- [13] Announcer: Seer, wake up. You may look at another player's card or two of the center cards. Seer, close your eyes. Robber, wake up. You may exchange your card with another player's card and then view your new card. Robber close your eyes. Troublemaker, wake up. You may exchange cards between two other players. Troublemaker, close your eyes. Drunk, wake up and exchange your card with a card from the center. Drunk, close your eyes. Insomniac, wake up and look at your card. Insomniac, close your eyes. Everyone, keep your eyes closed and reach out and move your card around slightly. Everyone, wake up.
